_comment: Per-model list prices in USD per 1M tokens, for models the Claude Code CLI cannot price (proxied/non-Anthropic). metrics.py recomputes total_cost_usd per API request from transcript usage when the model appears here; the CLI's figure is preserved as total_cost_usd_cli. Source for gpt-5.6-sol: OpenAI list pricing, July 2026 ($5/$30, cached reads $0.50, cache writes 1.25x, >272k-input requests billed 2x input / 1.5x output).
